zh.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton於大約1222年出生在蘇格蘭。她和Alexander de Wynton至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton于大约1222年出生在苏格兰。她和Alexander de Wynton至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton was born about 1222, in Scotland. She had at least 1 son with Alexander de Wynton.

fr.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton est née environ 1222, à Écosse. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alexander de Wynton.

de.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton wurde um 1222 in Scotland geboren. Sie hatte mit Alexander de Wynton mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton è nata il circa 1222 nel Scotland. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alexander de Wynton.

ja.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Setonは約1222年にスコットランドで生まれた。彼女はAlexander de Wyntonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton(은)는 대략 1222년 스컷랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Alexander de Wynton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Scotland. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alexander de Wynton.

ru.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton родилась около 1222 г. в местности Шотландия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alexander de Wynton.

es.lifeSummary: Heiress Margaret de Seton nació aproximadamente 1222, en Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Alexander de Wynton.
